narrative:
Cuy Falls 3-C (precinct in Summit County) has 953 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 28.9%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 12.1 percentage points.
